title: perrottetia distichophylla
intro: Perrottetia distichophylla, also known as the Mexican honey tree or the Mexican honey tree plant, is a flowering plant in the family Opiliaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Perrottetia distichophylla include treating respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as reducing fever and relieving pain. The plant can be prepared as a tea or a tincture, and it has also been used in traditional folk medicine to treat various health conditions.
